    "# Causal Inference Analysis\n",
    "This notebook performs causal inference analysis using the dagitty package to identify adjustment sets and estimate the Average Treatment Effect (ATE)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Load required libraries\n",
    "library(dagitty)\n",
    "library(data.table)\n",

   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Load the dataset\n",
    "data <- fread('/app/data.csv')\n",
    "head(data)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Load and parse the DAG specification\n",
    "dag_spec <- readLines('/app/dag.txt')\n",
    "dag_str <- paste(dag_spec, collapse='\\n')\n",
    "dag <- dagitty(dag_str)\n",
    "dag"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Find all minimal adjustment sets that satisfy the back-door criterion for T -> Y\n",
    "adjustment_sets <- adjustmentSets(dag, exposure='T', outcome='Y', type='minimal')\n",
    "adjustment_sets"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Convert adjustment sets to character vectors and save to file\n",
    "adjustment_list <- as.character(adjustment_sets)\n",
    "writeLines(adjustment_list, '/app/adjustment_sets.txt')\n",
    "adjustment_list"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Select the first adjustment set for estimating ATE\n",
    "first_adjustment_set <- unlist(strsplit(adjustment_list[1], '\\s*,\\s*'))\n",
    "first_adjustment_set"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Estimate ATE using linear regression with the selected adjustment set\n",
    "# Create formula for regression\n",
    "covariates <- paste(first_adjustment_set, collapse=' + ')\n",
    "formula_str <- paste('Y ~ T +', covariates)\n",
    "formula_obj <- as.formula(formula_str)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Fit the model\n",
    "model <- lm(formula_obj, data=data)\n",
    "summary(model)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],

# Load required libraries
library(dagitty)
library(data.table)
library(stats)

# Load the dataset
data <- fread('/app/data.csv')

# Load and parse the DAG specification
dag_spec <- readLines('/app/dag.txt')
dag_str <- paste(dag_spec, collapse='\n')
dag <- dagitty(dag_str)

# Find all minimal adjustment sets that satisfy the back-door criterion for T -> Y
adjustment_sets <- adjustmentSets(dag, exposure='T', outcome='Y', type='minimal')

# Convert adjustment sets to character vectors and save to file
adjustment_list <- as.character(adjustment_sets)
writeLines(adjustment_list, '/app/adjustment_sets.txt')

# Select the first adjustment set for estimating ATE
first_adjustment_set <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(adjustment_list[1], "[,]+")))

# Estimate ATE using linear regression with the selected adjustment set
# Create formula for regression
covariates <- paste(first_adjustment_set, collapse=' + ')
formula_str <- paste('Y ~ T +', covariates)
formula_obj <- as.formula(formula_str)

# Fit the model
model <- lm(formula_obj, data=data)

# Extract and save the ATE (coefficient of T)
ate <- coef(model)['T']
writeLines(as.character(ate), '/app/ate_result.txt')
EOF

    }

}
